summary: QA pass: manually verify 1 text per tradition against source
description:
## Goal

QA pass: manually verify 1 text per tradition against source.

## Responsibilities

- For each tradition in the corpus, select 1 representative text
- Compare raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.txt against the original source URL
- Verify:
  - Content accuracy (no missing sections)
  - HTML artifacts stripped (no navigation, scripts, styles)
  - Translator attribution correct
  - Metadata complete

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All selected texts verified against sources
- [ ] Any discrepancies documented and fixed
- [ ] Verification notes added to ticket comments

## See Also

docs/guru-implementation.md Stage 1: Corpus Acquisition - Acceptance Criteria
